Senior AI Engineer — Developer Tools

About the Company
We're building the next generation of AI-powered developer tools. Our platform helps engineering teams integrate LLMs into their development workflows — from code generation to automated testing to intelligent documentation. We're a Series B startup with 85 engineers, fully remote, and deeply committed to open source.

About the Role
We're looking for a Senior AI Engineer to join our Developer Experience team. You'll design and build the orchestration layer that connects our AI models to developer workflows. This is a hands-on IC role with significant architectural influence.

What You'll Do
- Design and implement multi-agent orchestration systems for developer-facing AI features
- Build CLI tools and SDK integrations that developers love to use
- Develop prompt engineering frameworks and evaluation pipelines
- Collaborate with ML engineers on model integration and fine-tuning workflows
- Contribute to our open-source projects and engage with the developer community
- Write technical documentation and blog posts about our engineering approach

Required Qualifications
- 5+ years of software engineering experience
- Strong Python proficiency with experience building production systems
- Experience with LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, or similar) including prompt engineering
- Experience designing and building CLI tools or developer-facing SDKs
- Demonstrated ability to architect modular, maintainable systems
- Familiarity with multi-agent or agentic AI patterns
- Strong written communication skills — you'll write docs and blog posts
- Active GitHub profile or open-source contributions

Preferred Qualifications
- Experience with TypeScript/JavaScript for SDK development
- Familiarity with terminal environments (tmux, shell scripting)
- Experience processing structured log data or telemetry pipelines
- Background in developer tooling or DevOps
- Experience with model evaluation and prompt optimization
- Contributions to AI/LLM open-source projects

Tech Stack
Python, TypeScript, React, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Docker, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions, Claude API, OpenAI API

Work Style
- Fully remote (US time zones)
- Async-first communication with weekly syncs
- Strong documentation culture — we write RFCs before building
- Open source by default — internal tools get published when possible
- Small autonomous teams (4-6 engineers) with high ownership

Compensation
$180K-$220K base + equity
